verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est verbum Domini ad Jonam, filium Amathi, dicens :
verses.douay_rheims: Now the word of the Lord came to Jonah, the son of Amathi, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herran sana tapahtui Jonalle Amittain pojalle, sanoen:
verses.king_james: Now the word of the Lord came unto Jonah the son of Amittai, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Surge, et vade in Niniven, civitatem grandem, et prædica in ea, quia ascendit malitia ejus coram me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֠וּם לֵ֧ךְ אֶל־נִֽינְוֵ֛ה הָעִ֥יר הַגְּדוֹלָ֖ה וּקְרָ֣א עָלֶ֑יהָ כִּֽי־עָלְתָ֥ה רָעָתָ֖ם לְפָנָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Arise and go to Ninive, the great city, and preach in it: For the wickedness thereof is come up before me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nouse ja mene suureen kaupunkiin Niniveen, ja saarnaa siinä; sillä heidän pahuutensa on tullut minun kasvoini eteen.
verses.king_james: Arise, go to Nineveh, that great city, and cry against it; for their wickedness is come up before me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et surrexit Jonas, ut fugeret in Tharsis a facie Domini, et descendit in Joppen : et invenit navem euntem in Tharsis, et dedit naulum ejus, et descendit in eam ut iret cum eis in Tharsis a facie Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֤קׇם יוֹנָה֙ לִבְרֹ֣חַ תַּרְשִׁ֔ישָׁה מִלִּפְנֵ֖י יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיֵּ֨רֶד יָפ֜וֹ וַיִּמְצָ֥א אֳנִיָּ֣ה ׀ בָּאָ֣ה תַרְשִׁ֗ישׁ וַיִּתֵּ֨ן שְׂכָרָ֜הּ וַיֵּ֤רֶד בָּהּ֙ לָב֤וֹא עִמָּהֶם֙ תַּרְשִׁ֔ישָׁה מִלִּפְנֵ֖י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Jonah rose up to flee into Tharsis from the face of the Lord, and he went down to Joppe, and found a ship going to Tharsis: and he paid the fare thereof, and went down into it, to go with them to Tharsis from the face of the Lord,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Jona nousi ja tahtoi paeta Tarsikseen Herran kasvoin edestä. Ja hän tuli Japhoon, ja kuin hän löysi haahden, joka tahtoi Tarsikseen mennä, antoi hän palkan, ja astui siihen menemään heidän kanssansa Tarsikseen Herran kasvoin edestä.
verses.king_james: But Jonah rose up to flee unto Tarshish from the presence of the Lord, and went down to Joppa; and he found a ship going to Tarshish: so he paid the fare thereof, and went down into it, to go with them unto Tarshish from the presence of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus autem misit ventum magnum in mare : et facta est tempestas magna in mari, et navis periclitabatur conteri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיהֹוָ֗ה הֵטִ֤יל רֽוּחַ־גְּדוֹלָה֙ אֶל־הַיָּ֔ם וַיְהִ֥י סַֽעַר־גָּד֖וֹל בַּיָּ֑ם וְהָ֣אֳנִיָּ֔ה חִשְּׁבָ֖ה לְהִשָּׁבֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the Lord sent a great wind to the sea: and a great tempest was raised in the sea, and the ship was in danger to be broken.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Herra antoi suuren tuulen tulla merelle, ja suuri ilma nousi merellä, niin että haaksi luultiin rikkaantuvan.
verses.king_james: But the Lord sent out a great wind into the sea, and there was a mighty tempest in the sea, so that the ship was like to be broken.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et timuerunt nautæ, et clamaverunt viri ad deum suum, et miserunt vasa quæ erant in navi, in mare, ut alleviaretur ab eis ; et Jonas descendit ad interiora navis, et dormiebat sopore gravi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽירְא֣וּ הַמַּלָּחִ֗ים וַֽיִּזְעֲקוּ֮ אִ֣ישׁ אֶל־אֱלֹהָיו֒ וַיָּטִ֨לוּ אֶת־הַכֵּלִ֜ים אֲשֶׁ֤ר בָּֽאֳנִיָּה֙ אֶל־הַיָּ֔ם לְהָקֵ֖ל מֵֽעֲלֵיהֶ֑ם וְיוֹנָ֗ה יָרַד֙ אֶל־יַרְכְּתֵ֣י הַסְּפִינָ֔ה וַיִּשְׁכַּ֖ב וַיֵּרָדַֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the mariners were afraid, and the men cried to their god: and they cast forth the wares that were in the ship, into the sea, to lighten it of them: and Jonah went down into the inner part of the ship, and fell into a deep sleep.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja haaksimiehet pelkäsivät, ja kukin huusi jumalansa tykö, ja he heittivät kalut, jotka haahdessa olivat, mereen keviämmäksi tullaksensa. Mutta Jona oli astunut alas haahden toiselle pohjalle, ja makasi uneen nukkuneena.
verses.king_james: Then the mariners were afraid, and cried every man unto his god, and cast forth the wares that were in the ship into the sea, to lighten it of them. But Jonah was gone down into the sides of the ship; and he lay, and was fast asleep.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et accessit ad eum gubernator, et dixit ei : Quid tu sopore deprimeris ? surge, invoca Deum tuum, si forte recogitet Deus de nobis, et non pereamus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרַ֤ב אֵלָיו֙ רַ֣ב הַחֹבֵ֔ל וַיֹּ֥אמֶר ל֖וֹ מַה־לְּךָ֣ נִרְדָּ֑ם ק֚וּם קְרָ֣א אֶל־אֱלֹהֶ֔יךָ אוּלַ֞י יִתְעַשֵּׁ֧ת הָאֱלֹהִ֛ים לָ֖נוּ וְלֹ֥א נֹאבֵֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the ship master came to him and said to him: Why art thou fast asleep? rise up call upon thy God, if so be that God will think of us that we may not perish.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin haahdenhaltia meni hänen tykönsä, ja sanoi hänelle: miksis makaat? nouse, ja rukoile Jumalaas, että Jumala muistais meitä, ettemme hukkuisi.
verses.king_james: So the shipmaster came to him, and said unto him, What meanest thou, O sleeper? arise, call upon thy God, if so be that God will think upon us, that we perish not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit vir ad collegam suum : Venite et mittamus sortes, et sciamus quare hoc malum sit nobis. Et miserunt sortes, et cecidit sors super Jonam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמְר֞וּ אִ֣ישׁ אֶל־רֵעֵ֗הוּ לְכוּ֙ וְנַפִּ֣ילָה גֽוֹרָל֔וֹת וְנֵ֣דְעָ֔ה בְּשֶׁלְּמִ֛י הָרָעָ֥ה הַזֹּ֖את לָ֑נוּ וַיַּפִּ֙לוּ֙ גּֽוֹרָל֔וֹת וַיִּפֹּ֥ל הַגּוֹרָ֖ל עַל־יוֹנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they said every one to his fellow: Come and let us cast lots, that we may know why this evil is upon us. And they cast lots, and the lot fell upon Jonah.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin he sanoivat toinen toisellensa: tulkaat, ja heittäkäämme arpaa, tietääksemme, kenenkä tähden tämä onnettomuus meillä on; ja kuin he heittivät arpaa, lankesi arpa Jonan päälle.
verses.king_james: And they said every one to his fellow, Come, and let us cast lots, that we may know for whose cause this evil is upon us. So they cast lots, and the lot fell upon Jonah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixerunt ad eum : Indica nobis cujus causa malum istud sit nobis : quod est opus tuum ? quæ terra tua, et quo vadis ? vel ex quo populo es tu ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמְר֣וּ אֵלָ֔יו הַגִּידָה־נָּ֣א לָ֔נוּ בַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר לְמִי־הָרָעָ֥ה הַזֹּ֖את לָ֑נוּ מַה־מְּלַאכְתְּךָ֙ וּמֵאַ֣יִן תָּב֔וֹא מָ֣ה אַרְצֶ֔ךָ וְאֵֽי־מִזֶּ֥ה עַ֖ם אָֽתָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they said to him: Tell us for what cause this evil is upon us, what is thy business? of what country art thou? and whither goest thou? or of what people art thou?
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin he sanoivat hänelle: ilmoita nyt meille, kenen tähden tämä onnettomuus meillä on? mikä sinun tekos on, ja kustas tulet? kusta maakunnasta eli kansasta sinä olet?
verses.king_james: Then said they unto him, Tell us, we pray thee, for whose cause this evil is upon us; What is thine occupation? and whence comest thou? what is thy country? and of what people art thou?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit ad eos : Hebræus ego sum, et Dominum Deum cæli ego timeo, qui fecit mare et aridam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר אֲלֵיהֶ֖ם עִבְרִ֣י אָנֹ֑כִי וְאֶת־יְהֹוָ֞ה אֱלֹהֵ֤י הַשָּׁמַ֙יִם֙ אֲנִ֣י יָרֵ֔א אֲשֶׁר־עָשָׂ֥ה אֶת־הַיָּ֖ם וְאֶת־הַיַּבָּשָֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to them: I am a Hebrew, and I fear the Lord, and the God of heaven, who made both the sea and the dry land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän sanoi heille: minä olen Hebrealainen, ja minä pelkään Herraa Jumalaa taivaasta, joka meren ja karkian on tehnyt.
verses.king_james: And he said unto them, I am an Hebrew; and I fear the Lord, the God of heaven, which hath made the sea and the dry land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et timuerunt viri timore magno, et dixerunt ad eum : Quid hoc fecisti ? cognoverunt enim viri quod a facie Domini fugeret, quia indicaverat eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽירְא֤וּ הָֽאֲנָשִׁים֙ יִרְאָ֣ה גְדוֹלָ֔ה וַיֹּאמְר֥וּ אֵלָ֖יו מַה־זֹּ֣את עָשִׂ֑יתָ כִּֽי־יָדְע֣וּ הָאֲנָשִׁ֗ים כִּֽי־מִלִּפְנֵ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ ה֣וּא בֹרֵ֔חַ כִּ֥י הִגִּ֖יד לָהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the men were greatly afraid, and they said to him: Why hast thou done this? (For the men knew that he fled from the face of the Lord: because he had told them.)
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin ne miehet pelkäsivät suuresti, ja sanoivat hänelle: miksis näin teit? Sillä ne miehet tiesivät hänen Herran edestä paenneen; sillä hän oli heille sen sanonut.
verses.king_james: Then were the men exceedingly afraid, and said unto him, Why hast thou done this? For the men knew that he fled from the presence of the Lord, because he had told them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixerunt ad eum : Quid faciemus tibi, et cessabit mare a nobis ? quia mare ibat, et intumescebat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמְר֤וּ אֵלָיו֙ מַה־נַּ֣עֲשֶׂה לָּ֔ךְ וְיִשְׁתֹּ֥ק הַיָּ֖ם מֵֽעָלֵ֑ינוּ כִּ֥י הַיָּ֖ם הוֹלֵ֥ךְ וְסֹעֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they said to him: What shall we do with thee, that the sea may be calm to us? for the sea flowed and swelled.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin he sanoivat hänelle: mitä meidän pitää sinulle tekemän, että meri meille tyventyis? Sillä meri kävi ja lainehti heidän ylitsensä.
verses.king_james: Then said they unto him, What shall we do unto thee, that the sea may be calm unto us? for the sea wrought, and was tempestuous.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit ad eos : Tollite me, et mittite in mare, et cessabit mare a vobis : scio enim ego quoniam propter me tempestas hæc grandis venit super vos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֲלֵיהֶ֗ם שָׂא֙וּנִי֙ וַהֲטִילֻ֣נִי אֶל־הַיָּ֔ם וְיִשְׁתֹּ֥ק הַיָּ֖ם מֵֽעֲלֵיכֶ֑ם כִּ֚י יוֹדֵ֣עַ אָ֔נִי כִּ֣י בְשֶׁלִּ֔י הַסַּ֧עַר הַגָּד֛וֹל הַזֶּ֖ה עֲלֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to them: take me up, and cast me into the sea, and the sea shall be calm to you: for I know for my sake this great tempest is upon you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän sanoi heille: ottakaat minut ja heittäkäät mereen, niin meri teille tyvenee; sillä minä tiedän, että tämä suuri ilma tulee teidän päällenne minun tähteni.
verses.king_james: And he said unto them, Take me up, and cast me forth into the sea; so shall the sea be calm unto you: for I know that for my sake this great tempest is upon you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et remigabant viri ut reverterentur ad aridam, et non valebant, quia mare ibat, et intumescebat super eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּחְתְּר֣וּ הָאֲנָשִׁ֗ים לְהָשִׁ֛יב אֶל־הַיַּבָּשָׁ֖ה וְלֹ֣א יָכֹ֑לוּ כִּ֣י הַיָּ֔ם הוֹלֵ֥ךְ וְסֹעֵ֖ר עֲלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the men rowed hard to return the land, but they were not able: because the sea tossed and swelled upon them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja miehet koettivat saada haahden kuivalle; mutta ei he voineet, sillä meri kävi väkevästi heidän ylitsensä.
verses.king_james: Nevertheless the men rowed hard to bring it to the land; but they could not: for the sea wrought, and was tempestuous against them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et clamaverunt ad Dominum, et dixerunt : Quæsumus, Domine, ne pereamus in anima viri istius, et ne des super nos sanguinem innocentem : quia tu, Domine, sicut voluisti, fecisti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרְא֨וּ אֶל־יְהֹוָ֜ה וַיֹּאמְר֗וּ אָנָּ֤ה יְהֹוָה֙ אַל־נָ֣א נֹאבְדָ֗ה בְּנֶ֙פֶשׁ֙ הָאִ֣ישׁ הַזֶּ֔ה וְאַל־תִּתֵּ֥ן עָלֵ֖ינוּ דָּ֣ם נָקִ֑יא כִּֽי־אַתָּ֣ה יְהֹוָ֔ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר חָפַ֖צְתָּ עָשִֽׂיתָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they cried to the Lord, and said: We beseech thee, O Lord let us not perish for this man's life, and lay not upon us innocent blood: for thou, oh Lord, hast done as it pleased thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin he huusivat Herran tykö ja sanoivat: voi Herra! älä anna meidän hukkua tämän miehen sielun tähden, ja älä lue meillen tätä viatointa verta! sillä sinä, Herra, teet niinkuin sinä tahdot.
verses.king_james: Wherefore they cried unto the Lord, and said, We beseech thee, O Lord, we beseech thee, let us not perish for this man’s life, and lay not upon us innocent blood: for thou, O Lord, hast done as it pleased thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tulerunt Jonam, et miserunt in mare : et stetit mare a fervore suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׂאוּ֙ אֶת־יוֹנָ֔ה וַיְטִלֻ֖הוּ אֶל־הַיָּ֑ם וַיַּעֲמֹ֥ד הַיָּ֖ם מִזַּעְפּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they took Jonah, and cast him into the sea, and the sea ceased from raging.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin he ottivat Jonan ja heittivät mereen; ja meri asettui lainehtimasta.
verses.king_james: So they took up Jonah, and cast him forth into the sea: and the sea ceased from her raging.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et timuerunt viri timore magno Dominum : et immolaverunt hostias Domino, et voverunt vota.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽירְא֧וּ הָאֲנָשִׁ֛ים יִרְאָ֥ה גְדוֹלָ֖ה אֶת־יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיִּֽזְבְּחוּ־זֶ֙בַח֙ לַֽיהֹוָ֔ה וַֽיִּדְּר֖וּ נְדָרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the men feared the Lord exceedingly, and sacrificed victims to the Lord, and made vows.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja miehet pelkäsivät Herraa suuresti, ja tekivät Herralle uhria ja lupausta.
verses.king_james: Then the men feared the Lord exceedingly, and offered a sacrifice unto the Lord, and made vows.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et præparavit Dominus piscem grandem ut deglutiret Jonam : et erat Jonas in ventre piscis tribus diebus et tribus noctibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְמַ֤ן יְהֹוָה֙ דָּ֣ג גָּד֔וֹל לִבְלֹ֖עַ אֶת־יוֹנָ֑ה וַיְהִ֤י יוֹנָה֙ בִּמְעֵ֣י הַדָּ֔ג שְׁלֹשָׁ֥ה יָמִ֖ים וּשְׁלֹשָׁ֥ה לֵילֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now the Lord prepared a great fish to swallow up Jonah: and Jonah was in the belly of a fish for three days and three nights.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Herra toimitti suuren kalan, nielemään Jonaa. Ja Jona oli kalan vatsassa kolme päivää ja kolme yötä.
verses.king_james: Now the Lord had prepared a great fish to swallow up Jonah. And Jonah was in the belly of the fish three days and three nights.
